children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to the Authority to carry out this subchapter $40,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2025 through 2029, to remain available until expended.

children.heading: Administrative expenses
children.label: b Administrative expenses
children.text: Not more than 5 percent of the amount appropriated under subsection (a) for a fiscal year shall be used for administrative expenses of the Authority.

children.heading: Minimum State share of grants
children.label: c Minimum State share of grants

children.text: the aggregate amount of grants under this subchapter for the fiscal year; and

children.label: A
children.text: the population of the State (as determined by the Secretary of Commerce based on the most recent decennial census for which data are available); bears to

children.label: B
children.text: the population of the region (as so determined).
